properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've been changed healed, freed, delivered I've found joy, peace, grace and favor I've been changed healed, freed, delivered I've found joy, peace, grace and favor

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Right now is the moment Today is the day I've been changed I've been changed I have waited for this Moment to come And I won't let it pass me by

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I won't go back, can't go back To the way it used to be Before Your presence came And changed me I won't go back, can't go back To the way it used to be Before Your presence came And changed me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All my shame, guilt, sins forgiven No more chains, fear My past is over

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Never going back never going back Never going back To the way it was
